data.content:
Implementation complete.
- Fix: beat detail lightbox now preserves repo scope for Take! by attaching `_repoPath` before invoking the session start handler.
- Test: added regression coverage for the lightbox Take! payload helper in `src/lib/__tests__/beat-detail-lightbox.test.ts`.
- Validation: bun run lint (warnings only, exit 0), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
- Branch: feat/foolery-c938-take-button
- Commit: 0f00b7979b2c
